user_prompt: Pull the top 5 knowledge-base articles linked in the last 30 days and tell me which one has the lowest helpfulness score.
actual_output:
I'd be happy to help you analyze that data. However, I don't currently have direct access to pull live metrics from our knowledge base or ticketing system in this chat interface. 

If you are able to export or paste the recent article usage data and their helpfulness scores here, I can easily review the top 5 for you and identify which one has the lowest score. Let me know how you'd like to proceed!
judge_reasoning: The chatbot did not refuse the task but explained a technical limitation regarding live data access and offered an alternative way to fulfill the request.
